title: ligularia × maoniushanensis
intro: Ligularia × maoniushanensis, a hybrid plant, is a member of the daisy family (Asteraceae) and is native to China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving headaches, and soothing digestive issues. Ligularia × maoniushanensis is often prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, and its roots and rhizomes are used in traditional Chinese medicine to make a decoction or tincture.
